title: selliguea stenophylla
intro: Selliguea stenophylla, also known as the Selaginella stenophylla or the spiny spike moss, is a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Selliguea stenophylla include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Selliguea stenophylla is often dried and made into tea or used in combination with other herbs to create a variety of remedies.
